ⓘ

Update on Your Application

Jordan, we've reviewed your application

Dear Jordan,

Thank you for your recent application with AussieLoanAI.

We are unable to approve your loan application at this time.

Assessment Factors
Policy criteria
Our current lending policy does not support new credit facilities within 24 months of a discharged bankruptcy. Your discharge date is within this period.

We have a responsibility under Australian lending rules to only approve loans we believe you can repay without financial strain.

What You Can Do
Here are some ways to strengthen a future application:
✓  Reapply after the 24-month policy window has elapsed
✓  Establish a clear savings pattern and clean credit history in the interim
Free Credit Report
You are entitled to a free credit report from each bureau once per year:
Equifax — equifax.com.au
Experian — experian.com.au
Illion — illion.com.au

We'd Still Like to Help:

If you would like to discuss other options or review your situation, please call Sarah on 1300 000 000 or reply to this email.

Thanks for coming to us, Jordan.

Call Sarah on 1300 000 000
Or reply to this email
Kind regards,
Sarah Mitchell
